children.text: the format and content of information submitted by a sponsor in support of a request under or a pending request;section 360fff–1 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: the data required to meet the safety and efficacy standard for determining whether a nonprescription sunscreen active ingredient or combination of nonprescription sunscreen active ingredients is GRASE and is not misbranded;

children.label: iii

children.label: iv
children.text: the process by which the Secretary will carry out , including with respect to how the Secretary will address the total number of requests received under and pending requests.section 360fff–3(c) of this titlesection 360fff–1 of this title

children.heading: Final guidance
children.label: B Final guidance
children.text: The Secretary shall finalize the guidance described in subparagraph (A) not later than 2 years after .November 26, 2014

children.heading: Inapplicability of Paperwork Reduction Act
children.label: C Inapplicability of Paperwork Reduction Act
children.text: Chapter 35 of title 44 shall not apply to collections of information made for purposes of guidance under this subsection.

children.heading: Submissions pending issuance of final guidance
children.label: 2 Submissions pending issuance of final guidance
A
children.text: persons may, beginning on , make submissions under this part; andNovember 26, 2014

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary shall review and act upon such submissions in accordance with this part.

children.heading: Currently marketed sunscreens
children.label: 1 Currently marketed sunscreens
children.text: Nothing in this part shall be construed to affect the marketing of sunscreens that are marketed in interstate commerce on or before , except as otherwise provided in this part.November 26, 2014

children.heading: Ensuring safety and effectiveness
children.label: 2 Ensuring safety and effectiveness
children.text: Nothing in this part shall be construed to alter the authority of the Secretary with respect to prohibiting the marketing of a sunscreen that is not safe and effective or is misbranded, or with respect to imposing restrictions on the marketing of a sunscreen to ensure safety and effectiveness, except as otherwise provided in this part, including .section 360fff–3(e) of this title

children.heading: Other drugs
children.label: 3 Other drugs
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in , nothing in this part shall be construed to affect the authority of the Secretary under this chapter or the Public Health Service Act ( et seq.) with respect to a drug other than a nonprescription sunscreen.section 360fff–6 of this title42 U.S.C. 201

children.heading: Effect on drugs otherwise approved
children.label: 4 Effect on drugs otherwise approved
children.text: Nothing in this part shall affect the marketing of a drug approved under or section 351 of the Public Health Service Act [].section 355 of this title42 U.S.C. 262

children.heading: Timelines
children.label: c Timelines
children.text: The timelines for the processes and procedures under paragraphs (1), (2), (5), and (6) of shall not apply to any requests submitted to the Secretary under after the date that is 6 years after .section 360fff–3(a) of this titlesection 360fff–1 of this titleNovember 26, 2014
